info.title: SA1201ier Formatter CLI Tool
info.description: Command-line tool for SA1201 Formatter - automatically format C# files according to StyleCop rule SA1201 (elements should be ordered by access level). Supports .NET 6.0 and later.

x-inspectra.cliParsedTitle: SA1201ier - Format C# and Razor files according to StyleCop rule SA1201

options.name: --check
options.description: Check for formatting violations without making changes

options.name: --alphabetical-sort
options.description: Sort members alphabetically within same access level

options.name: --sort-top-level-types
options.description: Sort top-level types by access level

options.name: --help
options.description:
Show this help message
Configuration:
SA1201ier looks for .sa1201ierrc files in the current directory and parent
directories. Options are merged hierarchically with child directories
overriding parent settings. CLI options override all config files.
Example .sa1201ierrc:
{
"alphabeticalSort": true,
"sortTopLevelTypes": false
}

arguments.name: PATH
arguments.description: The file or directory path to format or check (.cs and .razor files)
